title: APEX Adaptation Registry
description: Schema for adaptation-engine.js registry — persisted at System/Adaptations/adaptation-registry.json in the Obsidian vault. Written by runCycle(), read by getActiveAdaptations() and getRecommendationsFor().

version.description: Registry schema version. Increment when shape changes.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent runCycle() call that wrote this file.

totalActive.description: Cached count of active, non-expired adaptations for quick reads.

adaptations.description: All adaptations — active and expired. Expired ones are retained for audit history.

id.description: Unique ID. Format: adp-{type_prefix}-{timestamp_base36}-{random3}. Prefix map: rou=routing, pla=planning, mod=model_tier, ret=retry_strategy.

type.description: Category of adaptation. routing=tier/category decisions; planning=task structure; model_tier=specific model upgrades; retry_strategy=retry/delay config.

target.description: Scope of this adaptation. Three formats: 'category:{name}' (domain-scoped), 'stage:{STAGE}' (agent-stage scoped), 'global' (applies to all tasks).

action.description: Machine-readable action key. Consumed by orchestrator integration points. Convention: {verb}_{noun}_{qualifier}.

params.description: Structured parameters for programmatic consumption by integration points.

confidence.description: 0 = no signal / insufficient data. 1 = strong, high-volume signal. Formula: volume(40%) + signal_strength(60%). Minimum 0.25 to persist. Signal strength = |rate - 0.5| × 2.5.

evidence.description: Raw metrics that produced this adaptation. Preserved for audit and debugging.

source.description: Which data source produced this evidence.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when this adaptation was first created.

expiresAt.description: ISO timestamp after which this adaptation is considered stale. Currently 7 days from createdAt. If the pattern still holds at the next runCycle(), expiresAt is renewed. If not, the record is deactivated.

active.description: false = expired or superseded. Inactive records are kept for audit history but never returned by getActiveAdaptations().

appliedCount.description: How many times this recommendation was acted on. Incremented by recordApplication().

successCount.description: How many applications of this adaptation led to a successful outcome. Provides feedback loop for measuring adaptation effectiveness.
